text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
E-E-Excuse me, Rob Roy! Um, would you
happen to be looking for a bookmark?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
W-Well, I was in town the other day when
I just happened to spot you ahead of me,
and you dropped your bookmark in that
very same moment…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I picked it up right away and tried to catch
up to you, but I lost you in the crowd!
S-So I held onto it until I could give it back…

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
O-Oh, so that's where it went!
Thank you for keeping it safe for me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I'm surprised you recognized me just
from seeing my back. There's not much
about me that stands out…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your dark, shiny ears and your tail were
shining a glorious light! And you looked like
a great scholar holding your book! How could
anyone miss such a splendid horsegirl?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wh… What? I don't know what you're
talking about. What light? A scholar…?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You flatter me! Hehe♪ "The wise scholar
of light" sounds like a heroic tale…!
